remove.description: Remove a link between two rows from a link column

get.description: Get the content of a row

list.description: List all links of a specific row

lock.description: Lock a row to prevent further changes

unlock.description: Remove the lock from a row

update.description: Update the content of a row

snapshot.description: Create a snapshot of the base

metadata.description: Get the complete metadata of the base

collaborator.description: Get the username from the email or name of a collaborator

add.description: Create a link between two rows in a link column

getPublicURL.description: Get the public URL from asset path

upload.description: Add a file/image to an existing row

tableName.description: Choose from the list, or specify a name using an expression

rowId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fieldsToSend.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

autoMapInputData.description: Use when node input properties match destination column names

defineBelow.description: Set the value for each destination column

apply_default.description: Whether to use the column default values to populate new rows during creation (only available for normal backend)

notice.displayName: Hint: Link, files, images or digital signatures have to be added separately.

inputsToIgnore.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

columnsUi.description: Add destination column with its value. Provide the value in this way:Date: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD hh:mmDuration: time in secondsCheckbox: true, on or 1Multi-Select: comma-separated list.

columnName.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression
Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

bigdata.description: Whether write to Big Data backend (true) or not (false). True requires the activation of the Big Data backend in the base.

simple.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

convert.description: Whether to return the column keys (false) or the column names (true)

insensitive.description: Whether the search ignores case sensitivity (true). Otherwise, it distinguishes between uppercase and lowercase characters.

wildcard.description: Whether the search only results perfect matches (true). Otherwise, it finds a row even if the search value is part of a string (false).

replace.description: Whether to replace the existing asset with the same name (true). Otherwise, a new version with a different name (numeral in parentheses) will be uploaded (false).

append.description: Whether to keep existing files/images in the column and append the new asset (true). Otherwise, the existing files/images are removed from the column (false).

viewName.description: The name of SeaTable view to access, or specify by using an expression. Provide it in the way "col.name:::col.type".

searchColumn.description: Select the column to be searched. Not all column types are supported for search. Choose from the list, or specify a name using an expression.

searchString.displayName: Name or email of the collaborator
searchString.description: SeaTable identifies users with a unique username like 244b43hr6fy54bb4afa2c2cb7369d244@auth.local. Get this username from an email or the name of a collaborator.
searchString.placeholder: Enter the name or the email or the collaborator

linkColumn.description: Choose from the list of specify the Link Column by using an expression. You have to provide it in the way "column_name:::link_id:::other_table_id".

linkColumnSourceId.displayName: Row ID From the Source Table
linkColumnSourceId.description: Provide the row ID of table you selected

linkColumnTargetId.displayName: Row ID From the Target Table
linkColumnTargetId.description: Provide the row ID of table you want to link

uploadColumn.description: Choose from the list, or specify the name using an expression

dataPropertyName.description: Name of the binary property which contains the data for the file to be written
